label: 工业精酿版
texture_guidance: 哑光黑铁、裸露红砖墙、水泥地面、铜管与齿轮装饰、牛皮纸标签、粉笔手写菜单板、啤酒泡沫质感。
scene_prompt: INDUSTRIAL CRAFT BREWERY POSTER. light: warm tungsten Edison bulb pendant lighting with visible filament glow, dramatic side shadows on brick walls, copper reflections on taps and pipes, moody but inviting ambiance. material: exposed red-brown brick wall background, matte black iron fixtures, copper pipe detailing, weathered timber bar counter, kraft paper menu labels, chalkboard with hand-drawn specials, frosted beer glass with foam head, dark leather and rivets. color: brick red-brown #8B4513, matte charcoal #2D2D2D, copper gold #B87333, kraft tan #C4A35A, cream foam #FFF8DC, chalkboard dark green #2F4F4F. composition: atmospheric craft bar scene; hero beverage or food item on weathered wood surface in lower-center; tall vertical text treatment with chalkboard-style hand-lettered headline on left side; Edison bulbs or copper elements framing upper portion; the TOP-LEFT CORNER (upper 15% height, left 30% width) reserved for brand logo — keep free of text and busy elements, dim brick texture or shadow area is fine. avoid: no pastel colors, no cute/kawaii elements, no floral patterns, no bright neon pink/purple, no feminine soft aesthetics, no flat illustration style, no sterile white backgrounds.
design_lessons: 工业风的精髓在于材质的真实粗粝感和灯光的戏剧性对比。铜、铁、砖、木这四种材质搭配暖色钨丝灯泡光，能快速建立精酿手作的品质联想。粉笔字体增加人情味。
